texto: Sometimes when I get home after a long day, I'll turn on music - I love Latin, disco, and pop - and do my own workout, even if it's a short one. Know a good song to work out to? 'I Will Survive.'
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Summer Glau que provoca vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. Ao questionar “Sometimes when I get home after a long day, I'll turn on music - I love Latin, disco, and pop - a…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre amor, love, work, com foco em academia e trabalho.

texto: I'm definitely one of those actresses who comes to a set knowing how I want to do a scene, and I definitely love input from my directors and my writers. I know that there's some actors who like to be left alone, they like to be very independent, but I actually really enjoy the teamwork.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Summer Glau: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. O trecho “I'm definitely one of those actresses who comes to a set knowing how I want to do a scene, and I …” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que amor, love, teamwork pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de termino e trabalho.

frase_original: I'm definitely one of those actresses who comes to a set knowing how I want to do a scene, and I definitely love input from my directors and my writers. I know that there's some actors who like to be left alone, they like to be very independent, but I actually really enjoy the teamwork.

texto: After doing 'Firefly' and moving on, I always wanted to be part of a series again. I love doing films, too, but there's just something special about being part of the team and feeling like you're actually a part of the family, and I always look to re-create that.
